snippet.title: SГЈo Paulo e Palmeiras na final, Mancini cai, Fla-Flu, Gre-Nal e AmГ©rica x Galo | Posse de Bola #126
snippet.description:
PosseВ de Bola desta segunda-feira analisa a definiГ§ГЈo da final do Campeonato Paulista, com o Palmeiras classificado ao derrotar o Corinthians, que demitiu Vagner Mancini, enquanto o SГЈo Paulo goleou o Mirassol, Г© a primeira final entre Palmeiras e SГЈo Paulo no estadual desde 1992. No Carioca, Flamengo e Fluminense empataram a primeira final, em Belo Horizonte, AmГ©rica e AtlГ©tico-MG ficaram no 0 a 0 e o GrГӘmio venceu de virada o primeiro jogo com o Inter no GaГәcho.

Toda segunda-feira e sexta-feira, ao vivo, Arnaldo Ribeiro, Eduardo Tironi, Juca Kfouri e Mauro Cezar Pereira debatem os principais assuntos do futebol brasileiro. Inscreva-se no canal para nГЈo perder os prГіximos.

E para homenagear todos os profissionais que trabalham no mercado segurador, o Grupo Bradesco Seguros convidou a Sandy para interpretar uma canГ§ГЈo especial, criada para agradecer a todos que se dedicam com tanto carinho e cuidado, que fazem de tudo para deixar vocГӘ e sua famГӯlia protegidos e tranquilos. snippet.title: Little Mix - Confetti (Acoustic)
snippet.description:
Little Mix - Confetti (Acoustic Version) 

Listen to the new single вҖҳConfettiвҖҷ feat Saweetie: http://lttlmx.com/singleconfetti

Listen to the album 'Confetti': http://lttlmx.com/confetti вҖӘвҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬
Follow Us On Spotify - https://spoti.fi/2Qk4m4E вҖ¬ вҖӘвҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬
Listen On Apple Music - https://smarturl.it/LittleMix_AppleMusic вҖ¬
Listen On Amazon Music - https://smarturl.it/LittleMix_Amazon вҖ¬
Subscribe on YouTube - http://lttlmx.com/SubscribeYT 

Sign up to our newsletter: http://lttlmx.com/Newsletter вҖӘвҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬

Follow Little Mix:вҖ¬ вҖӘInstagram - https://www.instagram.com/littlemix/вҖ¬ вҖӘвҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬
Twitter - https://twitter.com/LittleMixвҖ¬ 
TikTok - https://smarturl.it/LMTikTok 
Facebook - https://facebook.com/LittleMixOfficial/вҖ¬ вҖӘвҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬вҖ¬

Musical Director:  Donavan Hepburn 
Vocal Arrangement: Joshua Alamu 
Guitar by: Daniel Hutchinson
Engineered by: Rob Derbyshire
Mixed by: Rob Derbyshire

Lyrics: 

We wanna celebrate like we in the club every day
Got all my friends here with me
And I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
Got this dress up on me
So I don't need your stress up on me
Baby, we're done, c'est la vie
Now I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
Should've left your ass from time ago
Didn't love me then, but now I do
I used to sit at home and cry for you
Diamonds on my neck, I shine for you
Ain't blocking my blessings anymore
Never be the girl I was before
I'ma let the good things in my life rain down
 
From the sky, drop like confetti
All eyes on me, so V.I.P
All of my dreams, from the sky, drop like confetti
Drop it down
You're missin' me, but I'm finally free
I got what I need, so let it rain down like Confetti
 
Flashing lights, I ain't got no worry on my mind
Know that you're mad, I realised
That I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
So, DJ, say my name like it's my birthday
You're just a memory
And, boy, I don't need ya, I don't need ya
 
Should've left your ass from time ago (time ago)
Didn't love me then, but now I do (now I do)
I'ma let the good things in my life rain down
 
From the sky, drop like confetti
All eyes on me (on me, yeah), so v.I.p
All of my dreams, from the sky, drop like confetti (woah)
Drop it down
You're missin' me, but I'm finally free (finally free)
I got what I need, so let it rain down like confetti
Down (Oh, la-la-la)
Rain down (oh, la-la-la)
Let it, let it rain down (oh, la-la-la) вҖ“ leigh ad lib
Let it rain down (oh, la-la-la) -  leigh ad lib 

From the sky, drop like confetti (yeah)
All eyes on me, so V.I.P
All of my dreams (all of my dreams, whoa)
From the sky, drop like confetti
You're missin' me (you're missing me)

I'm totally free (I'm finally free)
I got what I need (I've got what I need)

snippet.description:
Uma parГіdia de futebol da mГәsica "Liberdade Quando o Grave Bate Forte" do Alok com o MC Don Juan e o DJ GBR. Uma das mГәsicas mais estouradas do momento pra um dos caras mais estourados do momento, Cristiano Ronaldo chegou a 100 gols pela Juventus! Гү o Гәnico jogador na histГіria do futebol que tem 100 gols por trГӘs clubes diferentes + sua seleГ§ГЈo, entГЈo a gente jГЎ sabe que quando o Gajo bate forte...

snippet.title: Transformar o luto na nossa luta | Paulo Gustavo | Mini Saia | Saia Justa
snippet.description:
O luto Г© nacional, global, todos jГЎ fomos tocados de alguma forma pelas perdas da pandemia. MГҙnica Martelli, que retorna ao programa, estГЎ apenas no princГӯpio de sua jornada de saudades do amigo Paulo Gustavo, um de seus вҖңpedaГ§os mais bonitosвҖқ, como declarou em seu perfil no Instagram. 
Astrid Fontenelle, Pitty, Gaby Amarantos e a prГіpria Monica, falam com base no livro da escritora nigeriana Chimamanda Adichie, que tambГ©m viveu durante a pandemia uma grande perda вҖ”a morte de seu pai, no ano passado, vГӯtima de uma doenГ§a renal. Seu relato, publicado agora no livro вҖңNotas Sobre o LutoвҖқ, Г© nГЈo apenas de dor, mas de esperanГ§a e celebraГ§ГЈo da memГіria. Quais as tГЎticas de cada um para conviver com a dor? De que maneira vivenciar o luto Г© tambГ©m uma forma de lutar?

#Luto #PauloGustavo #SaiaJustaNoGNT

snippet.title: SANTOS 1 X 0 BOCA JUNIORS | BASTIDORES | CONMEBOL LIBERTADORES (11/05/21)
snippet.description:
Na noite desta terГ§a-feira (11), o Santos FC venceu o Boca Juniors por 1 a 0 na Conmebol Libertadores, e subiu para a zona de classificaГ§ГЈo para a fase mata-mata da competiГ§ГЈo. Com o triunfo, o Peixe foi para a 2ВӘ colocaГ§ГЈo do Grupo C, ultrapassando a equipe argentina pelo saldo de gols. snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Future Nostalgia Medley (Live at the BRIT Awards 2021)
snippet.description:
#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #BRITAwards2021
Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-KZfRV8c13fOCkhXdLiQ?sub_confirmation=1

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaoXT_LJuwEyESQlctWNDCwD

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaouNABcO_A9Xkn_Nkz0PT11

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - drivers license (Live From The BRIT Awards 2021)
snippet.description:
Olivia Rodrigo Performs 'drivers license' Live at the BRIT Awards 2021

Shop SOUR: https://smarturl.it/oliviarodrigoshop

Preorder SOUR: https://oliviarodrigo.lnk.to/preorder

Follow Olivia:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo/?hl=en

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Olivia_Rodrigo?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor

Tiktok :https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb?lang=en

Lyrics:

I got my driver's license last week
Just like we always talked about
'Cause you were so excited for me
To finally drive up to your house
But today I drove through the suburbs
Crying 'cause you weren't around

And you're probably with that blonde girl
Who always made me doubt
She's so much older than me
She's everything I'm insecure about
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
'Cause how could I ever love someone else?

And I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay now that I'm gone
Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

And all my friends are tired
Of hearing how much I miss you, but
I kinda feel sorry for them
'Cause they'll never know you the way that I do, yeah
Today I drove through the suburbs
And pictured I was driving home to you

And I know we weren't perfect
But I've never felt this way for no one, oh
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
I guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

Red lights, stop signs
I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
Can't drive past the places we used to go to
'Cause I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)
Sidewalks we crossed
I still hear your voice in the traffic, we're laughing
Over all the noise
God, I'm so blue, know we're through
But I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)

I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
'Cause you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
Yeah, you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

Se em momentos que marcaram
O final da histГіria acabasse sendo outro

Se o Edenilson sutilmente nГЈo tivesse um pouco a frente
E seu gol nГЈo evaporasse pelo VAR
Brasileiro ia ser diferente com os coloradГЈo contente
E o cheirinho deprimente ia voltar

Se o destino fosse mais prudente com o Ronaldo e de repente
O poupasse do acidente e do azar
Com um joelho ultra-resistente pode ser que o Ronaldente
Ia ter 10 Bolas de Ouro pra lustrar

O ET e o Ronaldo europeu 
Iam ser sГ©rie B para o Ronaldeus

CГӘ jГЎ pensou se o Cuca nГЈo tenta pegar a bola?
Se fica sossegadГЈo em frente ao Marcos Rocha?
Pode ser que o gol do Porco sumisse da histГіria
E o Peixe levanta a Liberta num tetra com glГіria

Se o HГ©verton da Portuguesa
NГЈo tivesse entrado naquela partida
A Lusa continuaria aqui na Primeirona, em vez de falida?
Se o Fluminense ficou com a fama
De salvo pela advocacia
Quem se salvou na verdade foi o Flamengo que Г© quem cairia

Se o ГЎrbitro doido apitasse o penal pra naГ§ГЈo colorada
E se sai esse gol
E a partida se desempata e o TimГЈo naufraga
No lugar de um vermelho, a vitГіria do Inter fora de sua casa
SerГЎ que o Brasa de 2005
Ia pro Beira Rio e sua sala de taГ§as?

CГӘ jГЎ parou pra imaginar?
Se o destino Г s vezes fosse no caminho oposto 
Se em momentos que marcaram
O final da histГіria acabasse sendo outro

Meu pai, se o Hugo nГЈo bugasse a cuca
Se nГЈo tentasse a finta maluca
Talvez o Urubu vencesse o bonde SГЈo Paulino
E terminasse com a Copa do Brasil pro Ninho

Conhece o caso AndrГ©s Escobar em 94?
Marcou um gol contra a sua ColГҙmbia e depois foi assassinado
JГЎ pensou se no dia, sem o azar na sua frente
Ele acerta o corte? Estaria aqui com a gente...

Meu Deus... como isso aconteceu?
Um erro nГЈo pode ser motivo de adeus

CГӘ jГЎ parou pra imaginar?
Se o destino... fosse pra um lado oposto 
Se em momentos que marcaram
O final da histГіria acabasse sendo outro

E na Liberta, na final em Lima
Se o Lucas Pratto nГЈo entrega feito uma criancinha
Se aquela marmota nГЈo gera o empate
Era tchau-tchau pro bi desses Coringa

Ou se o HiguaГӯn nГЈo pipocasse outra vez
Se, contra o Chile, ele marcasse o time ia vencer
O Messi iria ter uma taГ§a pra erguer
Pela Argentina pra calar seus hater de uma vez

E se o Zidane nГЈo tentasse atravessar
O Materazzi com a careca de matar
Sua presenГ§a nos penais podia ajudar
A Dona FranГ§a a ter mais uma Copa em seu pomar

Imagina se o Flu nГЈo para na mГЈo do Cevallos
Se o Thiago nГЈo sucumbe Г  catimba e guarda
Talvez mudasse a histГіria no MaracanГЈ lotado
Trazendo a Libertadores nunca conquistada

Se o Roberto Carlos nГЈo fosse arrumar o meiГЈo
Ou se fizessem a linha de impedimento bem feitinha
Pode ser que a FranГ§a nГЈo vencesse a SeleГ§ГЈo
E que o Quarteto fosse hexa com a Canarinha
JГЎ pensou?

CГӘ jГЎ parou pra imaginar?
Se o destino Г s vezes fosse no caminho oposto 
Se em momentos que marcaram
O final da histГіria acabasse sendo outro

snippet.title: ASSITA AO VIVO EM PORTUGUГҠS QUARTAS DE FINAL The Boost Mobile Margaret River Pro
snippet.description:
Assista Г s Semifinais e Finais em www.worldsurfleague.com!
Depois de um evento emocionante em Narrabeen que viu alguns dos maiores candidatos ao tГӯtulo serem perturbados por surfistas promissores, a imprevisГӯvel perna australiana segue para oeste para o Boost Mobile Margaret River Pro apresentado pela Corona. Os atuais lГӯderes do WSL Rankings, Gabriel Medina e Carissa Moore, tentam continuar sua corrida de domГӯnio. John John Florence e Sally Fitzgibbons procuram igualar o poder do surfe bruto da AustrГЎlia Ocidental, enquanto o prГіprio Jack Robinson de Margaret River espera transformar seu conhecimento local em uma vitГіria do evento. Assista ao vivo de 2 a 12 de maio em worldsurfleague.com

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Man City 1-2 Chelsea, City miss chance to clinch Title.
snippet.description:
CityвҖҷs hopes of being crowned Premier League champions were frustrated as Pep GuardiolaвҖҷs side lost out 2-1 at home by Chelsea.
Knowing victory at the Etihad would see us regain the title, we gained a 44th minute lead thanks to Raheem SterlingвҖҷs close-range strike.

Sergio Aguero then saw a 45th minute penalty saved вҖ“ and Chelsea hit back after the break as Hakim Ziyech levelled affairs on the hour.

However, though City strove to find a winner and saw a shout for a late penalty turned down, it was Cheslea who gained the winner, Marcos Alonso beating Ederson in injury time to seal the victory and ensure the race goes on вҖ“ at least for 24 hours.

Knowing victory at the Etihad would see us regain the title, we gained a 44th minute lead thanks to Raheem SterlingвҖҷs close-range strike.

Sergio Aguero then saw a 45th minute penalty saved вҖ“ and Chelsea hit back after the break as Hakim Ziyech levelled affairs on the hour.

However, though City strove to find a winner and saw a shout for a late penalty turned down, it was Cheslea who gained the winner, Marcos Alonso beating Ederson in injury time to seal the victory and ensure the race goes on вҖ“ at least for 24 hours.
